title: Commercial office, Type V-B, per-story area over the Group B limit
notes: Tests IBC Table 506.2: sprinklered over-NS area flags for the 506.2 S1/506.3 increase math (warn). 12,000 sf sprinklered single-story B/V-B is within the S1 allowance, so a hard fail would be a false positive.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: V-B
Stories: 1
Building height: 18 ft
Per-story area: 12,000 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes
Design occupant load: 60
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
Electrical: 400 A main breaker
Accessible parking and accessible route provided. ADA restroom. Braille signage.
NFPA 13 sprinkler system. NFPA 72 fire alarm.
Ventilation rate per IMC Table 403.3.
Panic hardware at exits. WC 4 LAV 4. CALGreen low-flow fixtures. Construction waste management plan.
